message:
chore(release): bump version to 1.2.0

This release includes 195 commits since v1.1.0 with major new features:

- Agent-sweep: Automated multi-repository AI code review orchestration
- Comprehensive testing infrastructure: Git harness for offline deterministic tests
- Parallel sync improvements: Work-stealing queue, global backoff coordination
- Quality gates: Commit plan validation, file denylist enforcement
- Bash 4.0-4.3 compatibility fixes for empty array handling

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
